clusters.title: Wave of Russian drone and missile attacks kill at least 15 in Ukraine
clusters.neutral_headline: Russia pummels Ukraine with drone and missile strikes, killing at least 12
bullet_summary: Reported by BBC Top Stories, France24, Guardian World and others

items.title: Wave of Russian drone and missile attacks kill at least 15 in Ukraine
items.standfirst: Meanwhile, a Ukrainian drone attack killed two children in Russia, officials say.
items.content: Meanwhile, a Ukrainian drone attack killed two children in Russia, officials say.

items.title: More than a dozen killed in Russian attacks on Kyiv, other Ukrainian cities
items.standfirst: More than a dozen people, including at least one child, have been killed in Russian missile and drone attacks on infrastructure and residential buildings in Kyiv and in other Ukrainian cities like Odesa and Dnipro overnight to Thursday. Several dozens of civilians were also injured in the assaults.
items.content: More than a dozen people, including at least one child, have been killed in Russian missile and drone attacks on infrastructure and residential buildings in Kyiv and in other Ukrainian cities like Odesa and Dnipro overnight to Thursday. Several dozens of civilians were also injured in the assaults.

items.title: Russia pummels Ukraine with drone and missile strikes, killing at least 12
items.standfirst: Missile and drone attacks on the port city of Odesa killed six people, with other fatalities recorded in Kyiv and DniproRussian strikes killed at least 12 people in Ukraine, local authorities have said, after Moscow pummelled its neighbour in overnight attacks.Missile and drone attacks on the southern port city of Odesa killed six people, the head of the city’s military administration, Sergiy Lysak, wrote on Telegram on Thursday. Continue reading...
items.content: Missile and drone attacks on the port city of Odesa killed six people, with other fatalities recorded in Kyiv and DniproRussian strikes killed at least 12 people in Ukraine, local authorities have said, after Moscow pummelled its neighbour in overnight attacks.Missile and drone attacks on the southern port city of Odesa killed six people, the head of the city’s military administration, Sergiy Lysak, wrote on Telegram on Thursday. Continue reading...

items.title: Russian attacks on Ukraine kill 14, including a child, authorities say
items.standfirst: Deadly attacks hit Kyiv, Odesa, and Dnipro, while Russia says two children killed in Ukrainian attacks.
items.content: Deadly attacks hit Kyiv, Odesa, and Dnipro, while Russia says two children killed in Ukrainian attacks.

clusters.title: Eighth grader kills 9, wounds 13 in Turkey school shooting
clusters.neutral_headline: Nine killed in second Turkish school shooting in two days
bullet_summary: A student who was 14 and armed with five guns opened fire in a Turkish school a day after another shooter injured 16 people and killed himself in another school, officials said
A student has killed nine people and wounded 13 others in Turkey's second school shooting in two days, officials said

items.title: Eighth grader kills 9, wounds 13 in Turkey school shooting
items.standfirst: A student who was 14 and armed with five guns opened fire in a Turkish school a day after another shooter injured 16 people and killed himself in another school, officials said.
items.content: A student who was 14 and armed with five guns opened fire in a Turkish school a day after another shooter injured 16 people and killed himself in another school, officials said.

items.title: Back-to-back deadly school shootings in Turkey
items.standfirst: At least eight students and one teacher have died in Turkey from a rare and troubling outbreak of school shootings. Holly Williams reports.
items.content: At least eight students and one teacher have died in Turkey from a rare and troubling outbreak of school shootings. Holly Williams reports.

items.title: Nine killed in second Turkish school shooting in two days
items.standfirst: Eight students and one teacher died in the attack, according to Interior Minister Mustafa Cifci.
items.content: Eight students and one teacher died in the attack, according to Interior Minister Mustafa Cifci.

items.title: Student kills at least nine people in Turkey's second school shooting in two days
items.standfirst: A 14-year-old student fatally shot at least nine people, including eight of his fellow students, and wounded at least 13 others at a middle school in southeastern Turkey. This is the country’s second school shooting in two days. NBC News' Raf Sanchez reports on Turkey’s deadliest school shooting.
items.content: A 14-year-old student fatally shot at least nine people, including eight of his fellow students, and wounded at least 13 others at a middle school in southeastern Turkey. This is the country’s second school shooting in two days. NBC News' Raf Sanchez reports on Turkey’s deadliest school shooting.

items.title: Student kills nine people in Turkey's second school shooting in two days
items.standfirst: A student has killed nine people and wounded 13 others in Turkey's second school shooting in two days, officials said.
items.content: A student has killed nine people and wounded 13 others in Turkey's second school shooting in two days, officials said.

clusters.title: Trump threatens to fire Fed chair Powell if he doesn't leave in May
clusters.neutral_headline: Trump threatens to fire Fed chair Powell if he doesn't leave in May
bullet_summary: Reported by BBC World, NPR News, Guardian Business

items.title: Trump threatens to fire Fed chair Powell if he doesn't leave in May
items.standfirst: Donald Trump's threat marks the latest escalation in his ongoing spat with Jerome Powell.
items.content: Donald Trump's threat marks the latest escalation in his ongoing spat with Jerome Powell.

items.title: Once again, Trump threatens to fire Fed Chair Jerome Powell
items.standfirst: President Trump once again threatened to fire Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell and doubled down on a discredited probe of the central bank.
items.content: President Trump once again threatened to fire Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell and doubled down on a discredited probe of the central bank. (Image credit: Chip Somodevilla)

items.title: Trump threatens to fire Fed chair Jerome Powell amid pressure campaign
items.standfirst: US president says he has ‘held back’ on firing the head of the Federal Reserve leading up to end of Powell’s term in MaySign up for the Breaking News US email to get newsletter alerts in your inboxDonald Trump threatened to fire Jerome Powell if he stays on as US Federal Reserve chair past the end of his tenure and doubled down on a criminal investigation into renovations of the central bank’s headquarters.As the White House pushes Trump’s new nominee to take charge of the Fed, Kevin Warsh, Powell has a month left in the role. The possibility of Powell staying on as chair past 15 May, the official end of his term, has grown amid mounting scrutiny of Trump’s approach to the Fed in the Senate, which is required to approve Warsh’s nomination. Continue reading...
items.content: US president says he has ‘held back’ on firing the head of the Federal Reserve leading up to end of Powell’s term in MaySign up for the Breaking News US email to get newsletter alerts in your inboxDonald Trump threatened to fire Jerome Powell if he stays on as US Federal Reserve chair past the end of his tenure and doubled down on a criminal investigation into renovations of the central bank’s headquarters.As the White House pushes Trump’s new nominee to take charge of the Fed, Kevin Warsh, Powell has a month left in the role. The possibility of Powell staying on as chair past 15 May, the official end of his term, has grown amid mounting scrutiny of Trump’s approach to the Fed in the Senate, which is required to approve Warsh’s nomination. Continue reading...

clusters.title: Bayern Munich edge Real Madrid to reach Champions League semi-finals
clusters.neutral_headline: Bayern knock Real Madrid out of Champions League in quarterfinal classic
bullet_summary: Reported by France24, BBC Top Stories, Al Jazeera

items.title: Bayern Munich edge Real Madrid to reach Champions League semi-finals
items.standfirst: Late goals from Luis Diaz and Michael Olise earned Bayern Munich a dramatic 4-3 win over Real Madrid on Wednesday, sealing a 6-4 aggregate victory and a Champions League semi-final against holders Paris Saint-Germain. Real Madrid had led three times in a high-tempo first half.
items.content: Late goals from Luis Diaz and Michael Olise earned Bayern Munich a dramatic 4-3 win over Real Madrid on Wednesday, sealing a 6-4 aggregate victory and a Champions League semi-final against holders Paris Saint-Germain. Real Madrid had led three times in a high-tempo first half.

items.title: Bayern strike late to beat Real Madrid in seven-goal thriller
items.standfirst: Bayern Munich leave it late in a back-and-forth classic to beat Real Madrid 4-3 to set up a meeting with Paris St-Germain in the semi-finals of the Champions League.
items.content: Bayern Munich leave it late in a back-and-forth classic to beat Real Madrid 4-3 to set up a meeting with Paris St-Germain in the semi-finals of the Champions League.

items.title: Bayern knock Real Madrid out of Champions League in quarterfinal classic
items.standfirst: Luis Diaz and Michael Olise score late goals in Munich to give Bayern a dramatic 6-4 aggregate win over Real Madrid.
items.content: Luis Diaz and Michael Olise score late goals in Munich to give Bayern a dramatic 6-4 aggregate win over Real Madrid.

clusters.title: Kanye West postpones France show after officials said he was 'not welcome'

It comes a week after the UK government announced it would block the rapper from entering the country

clusters.title: French government seeking release of 86-year-old French widow detained by ICE
clusters.neutral_headline: France seeks release of 86-year-old French widow detained by ICE
bullet_summary: Reported by NPR News, Guardian World

items.title: French government seeking release of 86-year-old French widow detained by ICE
items.standfirst: The French government is pressing the U.S. Department of Homeland Security to release the 86-year-old French widow of a military veteran from immigration custody in Louisiana after she was detained earlier this month.
items.content: The French government is pressing the U.S. Department of Homeland Security to release the 86-year-old French widow of a military veteran from immigration custody in Louisiana after she was detained earlier this month.(Image credit: Yuki Iwamura)

items.title: France seeks release of 86-year-old French widow detained by ICE
items.standfirst: Agents detained Marie-Therese Ross in Alabama on 1 April after she overstayed her 90-day visa, according to DHSThe French government is pressing the US Department of Homeland Security (DHS) to release the 86-year-old French widow of a military veteran from immigration custody after she was detained earlier this month.US Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) agents detained Marie-Therese Ross in Alabama on 1 April after she overstayed her 90-day visa, according to DHS. Ross is now being held at a federal immigration detention facility in Louisiana. Continue reading...
items.content: Agents detained Marie-Therese Ross in Alabama on 1 April after she overstayed her 90-day visa, according to DHSThe French government is pressing the US Department of Homeland Security (DHS) to release the 86-year-old French widow of a military veteran from immigration custody after she was detained earlier this month.US Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) agents detained Marie-Therese Ross in Alabama on 1 April after she overstayed her 90-day visa, according to DHS. Ross is now being held at a federal immigration detention facility in Louisiana. Continue reading...

items.content: The reforms signed by Salvadoran President Nayib Bukele would apply to people convicted of committing or being an accomplice to crimes including homicide, femicide, rape and gang membership. (Image credit: Salvador Melendez)

items.content: The new sentencing measure comes as President Nayib Bukele oversees a four-year-long state of emergency against crime.

items.title: Trump says Israel and Lebanon’s leaders will speak on Thursday
items.standfirst: The US president says the conversation will be the first between the Israeli and Lebanese leaders in 34 years.
items.content: The US president says the conversation will be the first between the Israeli and Lebanese leaders in 34 years.

items.title: Middle East war live: Trump says Israel and Lebanon leaders to hold talks Thursday
items.standfirst: US President Donald Trump said Wednesday that leaders of Israel and Lebanon will speak Thursday, after they held a high-level face-to-face meeting in Washington Tuesday -- the first such negotiation since 1993. Follow our liveblog for the latest updates.
items.content: US President Donald Trump said Wednesday that leaders of Israel and Lebanon will speak Thursday, after they held a high-level face-to-face meeting in Washington Tuesday -- the first such negotiation since 1993. Follow our liveblog for the latest updates.

clusters.title: South Africa names apartheid-era negotiator as ambassador to US
clusters.neutral_headline: South Africa names apartheid-era negotiator as ambassador to US
bullet_summary: Reported by Guardian World, BBC World

items.title: South Africa names apartheid-era negotiator as ambassador to US
items.standfirst: Appointment of Roelf Meyer seen as attempt to improve relations amid false US accusations of ‘white genocide’South Africa has appointed a former apartheid government chief negotiator during the talks that ended white rule in the 1990s as ambassador to the US, in what is seen as an attempt to improve the deeply strained diplomatic relationship between the two countries.Roelf Meyer replaces Ebrahim Rasool, who was expelled in March 2025 after he criticised the Trump administration. Continue reading...
items.content: Appointment of Roelf Meyer seen as attempt to improve relations amid false US accusations of ‘white genocide’South Africa has appointed a former apartheid government chief negotiator during the talks that ended white rule in the 1990s as ambassador to the US, in what is seen as an attempt to improve the deeply strained diplomatic relationship between the two countries.Roelf Meyer replaces Ebrahim Rasool, who was expelled in March 2025 after he criticised the Trump administration. Continue reading...

items.title: South Africa names apartheid-era politician as new ambassador to the US
items.standfirst: Roelf Meyer played a key role as a negotiator during talks to end white-minority rule in South Africa.
items.content: Roelf Meyer played a key role as a negotiator during talks to end white-minority rule in South Africa.
